description_long: This rifle features a classic AK-47 style design with a combination of metallic gold and wooden textures. The stock and handguard are rendered in a wood grain finish, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are metallic gold, giving it a striking, high-contrast appearance. The rifle has a curved detachable magazine, a prominent front sight post, and a rear sight notch, both in metallic gold. The pistol grip is black, providing ergonomic handling. The overall build is robust, with visible screws and mechanical details along the receiver. The muzzle is simple, with no visible suppressor or brake, and the rifle's proportions are consistent with standard assault rifles.
description: A gold and wood AK-47 style rifle with a curved magazine, black pistol grip, and metallic iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel tip, front sight post, and a narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the gold receiver, wooden stock, curved magazine, and black pistol grip.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver, with the barrel and magazine barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the gold and wood finish, curved magazine, and black grip, with mechanical details on the receiver.
